candidates.title: K2 Reverb Youth Ski Boots 2026 | K2 Skis and K2 Snowboarding
candidates.snippet: The convex shape and ribbed tread of the rubber add a lot of walking comfort and provide a much better grip. Still, integrated pads made of stiff and rigid materials, enable great power transmission and more precise release function of the binding. GripWalk soles are the perfect tuning parts designed for selected premium ski boots and bindings.
